source_text: Any item which meets all three of: - Located outside the Component Envelope F.1.15 - Located above 350 mm from the ground - Could load the Main Hoop, Main Hoop Brace, or Shoulder Harness Mounting during a rollover F.5.11.2 External Items must meet one of the two conditions: a. Be attached at a Hoop to Brace node or a fully Triangulated structural node without the ability to create a moment at the node b
